#### Some formulas
Big 6 Equations
	![Pasted image 20260222153728.png](/img/user/7%20-%20Images/Pasted%20image%2020260222153728.png)
	![Pasted image 20260222153747.png](/img/user/7%20-%20Images/Pasted%20image%2020260222153747.png)
With 3 variables, all equations can be derived
#### Vertical Acceleration
Free Fall - Situation where Gravity is acting on an object
	Ignore air resistance

Near the surface of the earth, objects fall with an acceleration equal to $\vec{g} = 9.8m/s^2 [down]$   
which is equal to the acceleration of gravity
	Some places might be 9.807 or 9.808
# References
[[EXAM REVIEWS/SUBJECT/Physics 11/1.2 Speed and Velocity\|1.2 Speed and Velocity]]
